text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're training during summer camp, and Biwa
Hayahide is running under the blistering sun.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... There... I've finished ten beach dashes. What's next on the list?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No. I made sure to drink plenty of water before
we started.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's increase the intensity of my exercises a little.
Can you make sure to record my numbers
accurately?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I want to determine the extent of my endurance
and how much more I can improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems really serious. What should we move
on to next?
choice_data_list: All right, time to enter aerobic hell!
All right, time to enter aerobic hell!

Let's add a forty-kilometer marathon to your
plate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems really serious. What should we move
on to next?
choice_data_list: All right, time to enter aerobic hell!
All right, time to enter aerobic hell!

Let's add a forty-kilometer marathon to your
plate.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh, aerobic hell?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I connect speakers to my phone and start playing
some music.

text_block_list.name: Speakers
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everyone! ♪ I'm Buff Chick, and welcome to a
Happy Hell of an Aerobics workout! Now, lift that
leg up—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Speakers
text_block_list.text:
Okay, warm-up's over! ♪ How ya feelin'? Now it's
time to get that upper body burning! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
B-but I've been doing this for an hour already...
Agh... That was... just the warm-up?!

text_block_list.name: Speakers
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Don't forget to SMILE! Now let's work
those glutes! Let me see you flex! And flex! One
more time now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Urrgghhh! Who came up with this torture?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A marathon... That would certainly help train all
my muscle groups, and not just the ones I need
for sprinting...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But forty kilometers is practically a full marathon.
If I start running now... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, I'll do it. I'm the one who asked for harder
training. If I can't handle this, then I should just
give up on my dreams right now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll show you that I can push through my limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide starts her forty-kilometer
marathon. This will be a good test of her overall
condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Quite some time later...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it myself! My baseline endurance
has really improved!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
All that training since the Derby has really paid
off!
choice_data_list: It sure has! You've been working so hard.
It sure has! You've been working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to lay it on so thick. The only
reason I performed poorly before was because I
lacked the conviction to push myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe all of this time, I've just been ignoring the
fact that I could choose to step beyond my
self-imposed limits.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The day I was overtaken and pushed myself too
hard to catch up, leading to my injury... Ever since
then, I've been playing it safe.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I've moved on to the next stage! I have
infinite possibilities before me, and the world is
mine!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I hope I didn't sound too conceited just now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's good to hear.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now all I have to do is put in a good showing at
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen to Biwa Hayahide's promises to herself as
we leave the sunset-bathed beach.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Training starts at 8 a.m. tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I'm improving faster than I previously calculated.
Now all I have to do is wait to test myself in a
race!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Still, I can't help thinking...)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DEEERRRBYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I guess they're still obsessed with the Satsuki Sho
and the Japanese Derby...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I think I'll have some warm milk, and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow. 10 o'clock. Race me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you'd better bring it 'cause I'm gonna do
the same, and I'm gonna beat you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. We'll see about that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Right now, you're my biggest threat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to beat both of you at the Kikuka Sho...
and claim first place on the podium.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how odd. There's nothing strange with what
Taishin is saying...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But my heart is beating so fast. I wonder why I
feel like this?
